tools.name: get_billing
tools.description: Billing status + self-service payment for your company: credit-wallet balance, pay-per-use flag, license tier / annual commitment, per-action prices, purchasable plans, and any approved-but-unpaid plans. Pass `checkout_request_id` to get a hosted Stripe Checkout URL to COMPLETE an approved plan, `to

tools.name: generate_threat_model
tools.description: Create a threat model from a normalized architecture (ReactFlow nodes + edges). Ingests components via the shared Stage-0 service; the pipeline then auto-generates threats. Returns the diagram id.

tools.name: verify_threats_in_code
tools.description: Verify whether threats are mitigated in a scan's uploaded code. With `threat_id`, verifies one threat synchronously and returns the verdict; without it, verifies every diagram threat in the background. Wraps code_review ThreatVerificationService.

tools.name: get_traceability
tools.description: Return the diagram→threat→finding→control→requirement→remediation traceability matrix for a scan in your scope, with coverage metrics.

tools.name: get_framework_coverage
tools.description: Compliance-framework coverage for a diagram (real, ControlCodeMap-backed), optionally for one framework, plus an optional crossmap relationship graph. Wraps derive_framework_coverage + crossmap_cypher.build_graph.

tools.name: get_remediation
tools.description: Compute a remediation plan for a threat/finding WITHOUT applying it (mode=dry_run). Runs the same governed engine as apply_remediation, including the patent gates, and returns the proposed steps.

tools.name: compliance_status
tools.description: Company-level compliance posture rollup (pass rate, control compliance, mitigated counts, per-framework coverage). Suitable for a CI gate. Wraps the traceability company rollup.

tools.name: discover_shadow_ai
tools.description: Shadow-AI posture (part of Code Security): unsanctioned / unknown AI-service usage discovered in code — totals, risk score, provider/type breakdown, hardcoded-key count, and top discoveries. Company latest, or one scan with `scan_id`. Reads code_review ShadowAIReport/ShadowAIDiscovery.

tools.name: get_api_security
tools.description: API security inventory (part of Code Security): discovered API endpoints with authentication status, risk level and risk factors, plus method/risk breakdowns. Company-wide or one scan with `scan_id`. Reads code_review ApiEndpointDiscovery.

tools.name: get_cloud_compliance
tools.description: Cloud security & compliance posture (Cloud Compliance): per connected cloud account, the latest CIS/NIST cloud-policy scan — compliance %, failing policies/records, status — plus a company rollup. Reads customers.Account.latest_scan -> compliances.ScanResults.

tools.name: code_review_scan
tools.description: Start (or re-run) a code-security scan for an existing scan/repository in your scope. Returns a poll pointer; results include SAST, secrets, deps, pipeline review and the traceability matrix.

tools.name: compliance_scan
tools.description: Run a cloud/platform or compliance scan against an account or diagram in your scope (async). scan_type ∈ platform|compliance|pipeline|sbom. Returns a task id to poll.

tools.name: apply_remediation
tools.description: Apply a remediation for real (mode=live). Routed through the full governance funnel — patent reachability/kill-chain gates, autonomy policy and the approval flow. If your policy requires approval it returns 'requires_approval' rather than acting.

tools.name: get_diagram_summary
tools.description: The canonical diagram summary every badge/card/header reads: threat counts by severity, risk value, compliance and framework coverage.

tools.name: get_insights
tools.description: Threat/control matrix metrics + framework coverage for a diagram, joined with its latest code-security scan when one exists.

findings.title: Description references secrets/credentials
findings.detail: Description of "code_review_scan" references sensitive artifacts (secret). A tool description has no reason to mention credentials.
